title: gaya endacantha
intro: Gaya endacantha, also known as the 'small-flowered gaya' or 'small-flowered gay', is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gaya endacantha include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Gaya endacantha typically involve the use of its leaves and flowers in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to alleviate various health conditions.
